paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.29, with a change of -4.38% from the prior close and -27.59% over the last 22 sessions. There have been 2 new news articles in the last 24 hours. Recent news includes an article about Project Matador, a 17-gigawatt private power and AI campus being built by Pantex, and an announcement about the admission of shares of Common Stock and Total Voting Rights.

The recent news articles are driving interest in the company, with Project Matador being a notable development. The articles are from sources including KFDA and PR Newswire, and were published on July 23, 2026.

There have been various SEC filings recently, including an 8-K/A filing on July 21, 2026, which disclosed the resignation of director Miles Everson, and an 8-K filing on July 15, 2026, which announced the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. There has been 1 Form 4 filing and 2 new social posts in the last 24 hours.
